source.description: A reviewed six-panel pencil-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent wooden spool of blue thread with one threaded sewing needle on warm off-white paper, with no fabric, scissors, buttons, lettering, logo, sewing machine, or extra notions.

process_strategy: The sequence fixes one shallow three-quarter spool and diagonal needle guide, wraps the wooden spool silhouette, builds the thread cylinder and full needle, adds the eye and one continuous loose strand, then introduces restrained blue, ochre, silver-gray, and shadow before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: spool axis, two flange ellipses, thread core, needle guide, and loose-thread path
final_elements.description: Light ellipses and axes establish a tipped wooden spool while one diagonal guide and one looping path reserve the needle and thread placement.

final_elements.name: wooden spool silhouette with top and bottom flanges and central barrel
final_elements.description: Clean outer contours turn the ellipses into a small wooden spool without changing its three-quarter angle.

final_elements.name: wrapped thread cylinder, full sewing needle, and continuous loose strand
final_elements.description: Thread bands wrap the central barrel while one complete needle and a single strand connect clearly to the spool.

final_elements.name: needle eye, flange center holes, thread ridges, and wooden edge rings
final_elements.description: A visible needle eye, two center holes, a few curved thread ridges, and restrained wooden rings clarify the established materials.

final_elements.name: blue thread color, warm ochre wood, silver-gray needle, graphite depth, and cast shadow
final_elements.description: Restrained colored pencil and soft graphite separate the thread, wood, and metal while keeping the paper and construction texture visible.

frames.visible_job: Places the spool axis, two flange ellipses, central thread core, diagonal needle guide, and loose-thread path at one fixed scale.
introduces: spool axis, two flange ellipses, thread core, needle guide, and loose-thread path

frames.visible_job: Wraps the ellipses with top and bottom flanges and a central wooden barrel, preserving the same shallow three-quarter tilt.
introduces: wooden spool silhouette with top and bottom flanges and central barrel
requires_prior_elements: spool axis, two flange ellipses, thread core, needle guide, and loose-thread path

frames.step_name: Wrap the thread and place the needle
frames.visible_job: Adds the wrapped thread cylinder, full sewing needle, and one continuous loose strand following the existing guides.
introduces: wrapped thread cylinder, full sewing needle, and continuous loose strand
requires_prior_elements: wooden spool silhouette with top and bottom flanges and central barrel
spool axis, two flange ellipses, thread core, needle guide, and loose-thread path

frames.visible_job: Clarifies the needle eye, flange center holes, curved thread ridges, and wooden edge rings on forms already established.
introduces: needle eye, flange center holes, thread ridges, and wooden edge rings
requires_prior_elements: wooden spool silhouette with top and bottom flanges and central barrel
wrapped thread cylinder, full sewing needle, and continuous loose strand

frames.visible_job: Adds blue thread color, warm ochre wood, silver-gray needle tone, graphite depth, and a soft cast shadow to existing shapes.
introduces: blue thread color, warm ochre wood, silver-gray needle, graphite depth, and cast shadow
requires_prior_elements: wooden spool silhouette with top and bottom flanges and central barrel
wrapped thread cylinder, full sewing needle, and continuous loose strand
needle eye, flange center holes, thread ridges, and wooden edge rings

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established spool, thread, needle, loose strand, material colors, texture, and cast shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established wood, thread, and metal

rejection_checks: No spool flange, barrel, thread wrap, needle, eye, loose strand, center hole, edge ring, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The spool, needle, and single thread path must retain one angle, overlap order, scale, and crop across all six panels.
The loose strand must visibly pass through the established needle eye and connect back to the spool without breaking or multiplying.
Reject fabric, scissors, buttons, lettering, logos, sewing machines, extra notions, decorative borders, or impossible tangles.
The finish must retain pencil texture and remain attainable as a compact twenty-minute still life.
